question: What is your proudest achievement
answer: I once completed 21 kilometer marathon. That's my proudest achievement.

answer: I am interested in this role because I have a specific interest in field of software development  and I have developed multiple interesting projects which will define my interest in this field.

answer: In my free time, I play badminton, football or other such as watch movies or swimming, etc.

answer: I have done internship in Coltus Technosolution in Internet of Things where I had developed  proximity based mask for COVID-19.

question: What are your expectations from this company
answer: I expect good responsibility and great projects on which I will work on and provide good values  and great projects to society.  That's my expectations for this interview.

question: How do you handle rejection
answer: I don't panic or don't get angry when someone rejects me, I simply ask them or understand why they reject, why I have face rejection and then think about the solution instead of just panicking.

question: How do you handle stress
answer: I don't get stressed mostly but when I get stressed now, I stop that work which gets me stressed for a minute  and do stress relieving tasks such as listening to music or watching social media etc.

question: Tell me about a time you failed
answer: I failed many times but I want to take admission in good college but I don't get good marks in diploma so I end up in bad college.

question: How do you manage multiple tasks
answer: I mostly focus on single tasks, but when I need to manage multiple tasks, I sort them by their importance and priority and give proper focus to task according to its importance.

question: Describe your work ethic
answer: I believe in honest and hard-working work with it because eventually it will provide value  to the company and society.
